title: Vividly Spiced Ethiopian Chicken Curry
description: A malty, pillowy, and indulgent Ethiopian dish featuring turmeric, double-fry chicken, and a blend of spices, served on a banana leaf.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 2 tablespoons of oil to the skillet and cook the onion, garlic, and ginger until the onion is translucent.
Add the turmeric, coriander, cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add 1 cup of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the skillet and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 15-20 minutes.
Serve the chicken curry on a banana leaf, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
